common_symptoms: unable to retract caliper for pad change
physical_solution: Activate EPB service mode to retract rear caliper pistons before pad/rotor replacement. Must release brake fully before piston retract.

procedure_steps.description: Connect scanner, key on engine off
Enter EPB service mode — caliper retracts automatically
Apply brake firmly 5 times to re-seat pads
Exit EPB service mode, verify parking brake function
